allow: Bash(ls -lh /d/药学监护/*.xlsx /d/药学监护/*.xlsm 2>/dev/null | head -20)
Bash(tree -L 2 -I '__pycache__' /d/药学监护 2>/dev/null || find /d/药学监护 -maxdepth 2 -not -path '*__pycache__*' -not -path '*.~*' | sort)
Bash(cd "D:/药学监护" && pip install flask openpyxl openai python-dotenv gunicorn 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(cd "D:/药学监护" && python -c "import config; import excel_io; import llm; import app; print\('All modules imported OK'\)")
Bash(cd "D:/药学监护" && python -c "import config; import llm; import app; print\('OK'\); print\(f'base_url={config.OPENAI_BASE_URL}'\); print\(f'model={config.OPENAI_MODEL}'\)")
